calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Action
Off Calendar Jun-24-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS K.K. AND Q.H'S MOTION TO DISMISS ACTION

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion to dismiss this action with prejudice by named plaintiffs K.K. and Q.H. and to dismiss the action without prejudice as to class members is granted. The stay is lifted for the purpose of entering this dismissal. Proposed order submitted for review. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
